description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature olive green canvas belt from lee is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.. Length: 80 cms Made of canvas with a leather band stitched to the end of the belt for enhanced style Metallic loops to serve as a buckle Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand symbol embossed on the leather Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner to protect the leather if necessary
